data.note: Pradosh: 1.5 hrs before sunset to 1 hr after

data.name: Shani Pradosh
data.note: Pradosh: 1.5 hrs before sunset to 1 hr after

data.name: Buddha Purnima
data.note: Celebrates the birth, enlightenment, and Mahaparinirvana of Gautama Buddha - Vaisakh Shukla Purnima. National holiday in India.

data.name: Sitalshashthi
data.note: Shiva-Parvati ceremonial wedding festival in Odisha.

data.name: Onam (Thiruvonam Season)
data.note: Kerala harvest festival window around Thiruvonam.

data.name: Panchami Shraddha
data.note: Pitru Paksha Day 5 - Shraddha for ancestors who died on Panchami

data.name: All Saints' Day
data.note: Commemoration of all saints in Christian traditions.

data.name: Ahoi Ashtami
data.note: Kartik Krishna Ashtami - mothers fast for children's well-being; observed 8 days before Diwali

data.name: Hornbill Festival Day 1
data.note: Nagaland's Festival of Festivals - Day 1 of 10. Celebrates the heritage, music, dance, arts, and cuisine of all Naga tribes at Kisama Heritage Village, Kohima. Named after the revered hornbill bird featured in Naga warrior headgear.

dev_notes: Abbreviated sample: all 12 months are shown with their real headers, but each lists only the first 2 days (verbatim from a live response). A real response returns every day of every month (same per-day shape). Regenerate from a live API call for the full payload.
